Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days.
Exit load, stamp duty and tax
Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days.
Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020)
If you redeem within two years, returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab. If you redeem after two years, returns are taxed at 12.5%.
Groww Multi Asset Allocation Fund Direct Growth
Groww Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Groww Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Apr 2008. Wilfred Peter Gonsalves is the Current Fund Manager of Groww Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Mana
Groww Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Groww Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Apr 2008. Wilfred Peter Gonsalves is the Current Fund Manager of Groww Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹4,262 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 06 Mar 2026 is ₹24.98.
The Groww Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹500. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹500. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days.
Investment Objective
The scheme seeks to provide returns that are in line with returns provided by Groww Silver Exchange Traded Fund.

investment objective and risk tolerance
